title: World depth
description: A mod made to extend the world downwards and ads new ores
body:
# **This mod is still being developed**

[![ModDex rating](https://moddex.gg/badges/projects/world-depth/rating.svg?style=social)](https://moddex.gg/mod/world-depth)

## General discription
This is a mod that aims to extend the world futher down
by adding other stone variants like mojang did in 1.18.
It will also add a few extra ores and the armor and tools that go with it.

## Features
- World extended to -256
- New workstation called Energizer which allows you to make new alloys and energize materials which give them new properties such as giving potion effects.


<details>
<summary>Planned Features</summary>

### Main Features
- Armor and tools for all (added) materials
- World gen
  - New ore gen for all materials and all ores already present in all types of stone
- New village deep underground with new villager type (planned for aplha0.3)
- New biome that generates below -128 (planned for aplha0.3)
- New cave generator wich generates even more massive caves that stretch from -250 or lower to -64 or above (planned for aplha0.3)
### Potential Features:
  - New mob
  - The ability to create alloys of materials that are not added by me but procederally generated. (this is something I don't know how I would do it at this moment)

</details>
